recommendations.title: Monitor Energy Price Shock and Escalate if Threshold Breached
recommendations.description: Implement a real-time monitoring system for energy price changes; escalate to senior management if energy price shock exceeds 25% YoY or 2σ above 5-year rolling mean within 6 months to mitigate ₹50 Cr margin erosion risk.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹50 Cr cumulative margin erosion by proactive risk management
recommendations.roi_cap_reason: Capped at 200% (operational ceiling). Raw estimate was 400%; cap prevents over-claim.

audit_trail.value: Sustained margin erosion from energy risks could accumulate to >₹50 Cr
Threshold for energy price shock defined as ΔEP >= 25% YoY or EP >= 2σ above 5-yr mean
Monitoring and escalation aligned with BRSR risk disclosure requirements

recommendations.title: Accelerate Renewable Energy Sourcing for EU Taxonomy Alignment
recommendations.description: Develop and implement a plan to increase renewable energy sourcing to at least 50% by 2028, unlocking EU Taxonomy-aligned green financing and reducing cost of capital by 20-40 bps, with a budget of ₹10-15 Cr for capex and project management.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential ₹200 Cr green bond opportunity at 30 bps discount due to EU Taxonomy alignment
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power committed 80% renewable portfolio by 2030 and issued ₹5000 Cr green bonds

audit_trail.value: Accelerate renewable energy sourcing to unlock EU Taxonomy-aligned green financing
Competitor committed to 80% renewable portfolio by 2030 and issued ₹5000 Cr green bonds
Alignment with EU Taxonomy mandatory for green financing eligibility

recommendations.title: Publish Investor-Day Update on Transition Capex and Abatement Curve
recommendations.description: Organize an investor-day by 2026-11-30 to disclose detailed transition capex plans and abatement curve progress, improving transparency under ESRS and BRSR frameworks to enhance ESG ratings and reduce fund outflow risk.
recommendations.profitability_link: Mitigate 5-10% P/E compression risk by improving ESG disclosure and investor confidence

audit_trail.value: Weak GRI disclosure leads to lower ESG ratings and fund outflow
Investor communication aligned with ESRS and BRSR disclosure requirements
Investor-day update archetype recommended for transition capex disclosure

immediate_high.title: Monitor Energy Price Shock and Escalate if Threshold Breached
Accelerate Renewable Energy Sourcing for EU Taxonomy Alignment

immediate_low.title: Publish Investor-Day Update on Transition Capex and Abatement Curve
